query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, IS_NULLABLE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME IN ('offerLeads', 'appointments', 'campRegistrations') AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('age', 'gender', 'patientMessage') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2xtgvXGdr7mxJSP.root --database HgGpRPs4xs9xrzjfX4xmFY --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME, IS_NULLABLE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME IN ('offerLeads', 'appointments', 'campRegistrations') AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('age', 'gender', 'patientMessage') ORDER BY TABLE_NAME, ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
TABLE_NAME	COLUMN_NAME	IS_NULLABLE
appointments	age	YES
appointments	gender	YES
appointments	patientMessage	YES
campRegistrations	age	YES
campRegistrations	gender	YES
